prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.actor: edge-LLM model researcher sa isang open-weights frontier lab
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.job: Mag-disenyo ng 1-bit-native training recipe para sa isang open-weights mid-size LLM family, ginagaya ang production-quality result ng Bonsai 8B.
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.outcome: Public release ng isang 1-bit-native checkpoint sa Qwen o Llama family na may quality na katumbas ng 4/8-bit post-quantized peer nito.
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.motivation: Ang pagkuha ng edge-LLM standard-recipe slot bago i-lock ng mga competitors ang citation share, downstream tooling, at hardware-vendor co-marketing.

task.what: i-rerun ang pretraining gamit ang 1-bit weight parameterization at matched data budget

task.why: mag-ship ng 1-bit derivative bago maging default ang Bonsai recipe

prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.actor: on-device inference runtime engineer sa isang mobile/edge runtime vendor
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.job: Mag-land ng production-grade 1-bit kernels at packed-weight loaders para ang 1-bit checkpoints ay tumakbo nang mas mabilis kaysa sa kanilang 4-bit-quantized peers sa phone-class hardware.
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.outcome: Release notes na nagpapakita ng 1-bit checkpoints na nag-loload sa sub-1.5 GB at tinatalo ang 4-bit latency sa standard benchmark suite ng runtime.
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.motivation: Anumang runtime ang unang mag-ship ng first-class 1-bit support ay magiging default deployment target para sa susunod na wave ng 1-bit derivatives.

task.who: kernel/perf engineers + model-loader maintainers + mobile QA
task.what: i-implement ang packed-bit matmul kernels at i-integrate ang Bonsai-style loader
task.where: llama.cpp / MLX / ExecuTorch / ONNX Runtime mobile codepaths
task.why: gawing path of least resistance ang 1-bit para sa downstream app developers
task.how: ARM SME / Apple AMX / Adreno DP4A intrinsics + packed-weight format

prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.actor: open-weights model-family release maintainer (Qwen / Llama line steward)

prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.outcome: Isang official 1-bit checkpoint card sa Hugging Face sa ilalim ng canonical org, na may parity-grade evals at sub-1.5 GB artifact.
prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.motivation: Pagtatanggol sa katayuan ng family bilang default open-weights edge target; ang pagbibigay ng 1-bit sa kalaban ay magdudulot ng fragmentation sa ecosystem na nakapaligid sa kanilang releases.
